signals.headline: US Blockade of Iranian Ports Now in Effect After Failed Ceasefire Talks | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US Blockade of Iranian Ports Now in Effect After Failed Ceasefire Talks | NO | HIGH confidence**  
US President Trump announced that Iran "wants a ceasefire deal very badly," but direct talks in Pakistan collapsed over Iran's nuclear ambitions and Strait of Hormuz control, leading to a US naval blockade starting around midnight Australian Eastern time (late April 13 UTC).[1][2][3]

signals.headline: MicroStrategy Confirms $1 Billion Bitcoin Purchase, Adding 13,927 BTC to Holdings (Now ~781K BTC) | YES | HIGH confidenc
signals.raw:
MicroStrategy Confirms $1 Billion Bitcoin Purchase, Adding 13,927 BTC to Holdings (Now ~781K BTC) | YES | HIGH confidence**  
MicroStrategy's announcement of buying 13,927 BTC for $1B—pushing total holdings near 781K BTC with 5.6% YTD yield—has driven a short squeeze amid geopolitical tensions, propelling Bitcoin to an intraday high of $72,629 and current price of $74,313 (up 4.52% in 24h).[1][2][

signals.raw:

The Bank of Korea's Monetary Policy Board unanimously decided on April 10, 2026, to keep its policy rate unchanged at 2.5%, citing inflation at ~2.2% (above the 2% target), rising oil prices from Middle East conflict, and a weakened won near 1,520/USD, with expected
